'''wovaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:faboo|faboo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:faboo|faboo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wovaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wovarithi|wovarithi]] || [[word:wovariji|wovariji]] || [[word:wovarishi|wovarishi]] || [[word:wovariki|wovariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wovaruthuthu|wovaruthuthu]] || [[word:wovarujuju|wovarujuju]] || [[word:wovarushushu|wovarushushu]] || [[word:wovarukuku|wovarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wovaruthu|wovaruthu]] || [[word:wovaruju|wovaruju]] || [[word:wovarushu|wovarushu]] || [[word:wovaruku|wovaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wovarufthuf|wovarufthuf]] || [[word:wovarufjuf|wovarufjuf]] || [[word:wovarufshuf|wovarufshuf]] || [[word:wovarufkuf|wovarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wovarethe|wovarethe]] || [[word:wovareje|wovareje]] || [[word:wovareshe|wovareshe]] || [[word:wovareke|wovareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wovarothotho|wovarothotho]] || [[word:wovarojojo|wovarojojo]] || [[word:wovaroshosho|wovaroshosho]] || [[word:wovarokoko|wovarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wovarotho|wovarotho]] || [[word:wovarojo|wovarojo]] || [[word:wovarosho|wovarosho]] || [[word:wovaroko|wovaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wovarofthof|wovarofthof]] || [[word:wovarofjof|wovarofjof]] || [[word:wovarofshof|wovarofshof]] || [[word:wovarofkof|wovarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfthÃŸf|wovarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfjÃŸf|wovarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfshÃŸf|wovarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfkÃŸf|wovarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wovarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wovarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wovarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wovarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfthÃŸf|wovarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfjÃŸf|wovarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfshÃŸf|wovarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfkÃŸf|wovarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfthÃŸf|wovarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfjÃŸf|wovarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfshÃŸf|wovarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wovarÃŸfkÃŸf|wovarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wovarÃḊthÃḊ|wovarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wovarÃḊjÃḊ|wovarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wovarÃḊshÃḊ|wovarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wovarÃḊkÃḊ|wovarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wovarathatha|wovarathatha]] || [[word:wovarajaja|wovarajaja]] || [[word:wovarashasha|wovarashasha]] || [[word:wovarakaka|wovarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wovaratha|wovaratha]] || [[word:wovaraja|wovaraja]] || [[word:wovarasha|wovarasha]] || [[word:wovaraka|wovaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wovarafthaf|wovarafthaf]] || [[word:wovarafjaf|wovarafjaf]] || [[word:wovarafshaf|wovarafshaf]] || [[word:wovarafkaf|wovarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wovarasha|wovarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wovarshÃḋsha|wovarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wovarosha|wovarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wovarmusha|wovarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wovaryasha|wovaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowovarnkshÃḋsha|gowovarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowovarnkrosha|gowovarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowovarnkmusha|gowovarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowovarnkyasha|gowovarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wovavarasha|wovavarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wovavarshÃḋsha|wovavarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wovavarosha|wovavarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wovavarmusha|wovavarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wovavaryasha|wovavaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowovavarnkshÃḋsha|gowovavarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowovavarnkrosha|gowovavarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowovavarnkmusha|gowovavarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowovavarnkyasha|gowovavarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wevÃḊrasha|wevÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wevÃḊrshÃḋsha|wevÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wevÃḊrosha|wevÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wevÃḊrmusha|wevÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wevÃḊryasha|wevÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowevÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gowevÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowevÃḊrnkrosha|gowevÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowevÃḊrnkmusha|gowevÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowevÃḊrnkyasha|gowevÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wovfarasha|wovfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wovfarshÃḋsha|wovfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wovfarosha|wovfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wovfarmusha|wovfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wovfaryasha|wovfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowovfarnkshÃḋsha|gowovfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowovfarnkrosha|gowovfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowovfarnkmusha|gowovfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowovfarnkyasha|gowovfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
